prompt: Convert data points to geometric shapes, like squares and triangles, colored by class with a legend update.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform all circular data points on the scatter plot into a mixture of squares and triangles. Each transformed shape must retain its original color corresponding to its class and its original size. Update the 'Classes' legend located in the bottom-left corner to show squares and triangles for each class, maintaining their respective colors. Additionally, update the 'Sizes' legend in the top-right corner to display squares and triangles representing the different size values, while preserving their grayscale progression and relative sizes.
objects: Data points as a mixture of squares and triangles, retaining original colors and sizes
'Classes' legend in bottom-left with squares and triangles for each class color
'Sizes' legend in top-right with squares and triangles displaying grayscale progression and relative sizes
Purple colored shapes (data points and 'Classes' legend)
Blue-green colored shapes (data points and 'Classes' legend)
Green colored shapes (data points and 'Classes' legend)
Yellow colored shapes (data points and 'Classes' legend)
Circular data points (should not be present)
